chapter_title.ar: باب مَوْلِدِ الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ ( عليه السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 116 – Nazool (Arrival) of Al-Husayn Bin Ali<sup>asws</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل وآخرم أيضا مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5/364)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل وآخرم أيضا مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5/364)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) لَمَّا كَانَ مِنْ أَمْرِ الْحُسَيْنِ ( عليه السلام ) مَا كَانَ ضَجَّتِ الْمَلَائِكَةُ إِلَى اللَّهِ بِالْبُكَاءِ وَ قَالَتْ يُفْعَلُ هَذَا بِالْحُسَيْنِ صَفِيِّكَ وَ ابْنِ نَبِيِّكَ قَالَ فَأَقَامَ اللَّهُ لَهُمْ ظِلَّ الْقَائِمِ ( عليه السلام ) وَ قَالَ بِهَذَا أَنْتَقِمُ لِهَذَا .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Al Hassan, from Muhammad Bin Isa Bin Ubeyd, from Ali Bin Asbat, from Sayf Bin Ameyra, from Muhammad Bin Humran who said,

‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘When it was from the matter of Al-Husayn<sup>asws</sup> what was, the Angels raised a clamour to Allah<sup>azwj</sup> with the wailing, and they said: ‘This has been done to Al-Husayn<sup>asws</sup>, Your<sup>azwj</sup> elite and a son<sup>asws</sup> of Your<sup>azwj</sup> Prophet<sup>saww</sup>!’ So Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Established a shadow of Al-Qaim<sup>asws</sup> for them and Said: “With this one I<sup>azwj</sup> shall Take revenge for this one<sup>asws</sup>”’.
en.sarwar: In another hadith from abu al-Hassan al-Rida (a.s.) it is said that the Holy Prophet (s.a) woulld come to al-Husayn and would place his tongue in his mouth and it would suffice him (as food) and that he did have any milk from any female.
